---
title: "AKFIN - Sea Ice Data and Information "
---
This website presents sea ice indicators derived from data primarily 
remote sensing geospatial sea ice data products. The indicators may
provide information and insights for understanding the trends of the sea ice 
environment in the Alaska region.

The indicators presented here are associated with the three regions 
defined by the Ecosystem Management Regions that AKFIN supports.

[Sea Ice Extent](extent.qmd)
